description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a prominent front porch supported by white columns and a symmetrical facade. The exterior is finished in a dark color with contrasting white railings and trim, giving it a contemporary yet inviting appearance. The property includes a paved driveway with two parking spaces, landscaped with palm trees and additional greenery. On one side, there is a backyard area with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and a large umbrella, providing a recreational space. The bungalow is surrounded by several mature trees, enhancing its suburban setting. Large windows are arranged in a regular pattern on both floors, allowing ample natural light into the interior.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, front porch, driveway, and backyard pool, surrounded by trees and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch with columns, driveway, and two palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool area, sun loungers, umbrella, and additional greenery.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the pool, umbrella, and the side landscaping with trees.
